name: Win-Back
description: 3-step win-back: day 90 email, day 105 email with discount, day 120 SMS.

steps.subject: We miss you, {{first_name}}!
steps.preview_text: It's been a while since your last visit.
steps.body_html:
We Miss You!

Hi {{first_name}},

It's been a while since you shopped with us, and we wanted to check in. We've added some exciting new products that we think you'll love.

See What's New
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, we miss you! Check out what's new at {{site_url}}.

steps.subject: A special offer to welcome you back
steps.body_html:
Welcome Back Gift

Hi {{first_name}},

We'd love to see you again. Here's an exclusive 15% discount as our way of saying we value you.

Use code: COMEBACK15

Shop Now & Save

Valid for the next 14 days.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here's 15% off to welcome you back. Use code COMEBACK15 at {{site_url}}. Valid 14 days.

steps.sms_body: Hi {{first_name}}, it's {{site_name}}. We miss you! Your 15% discount code COMEBACK15 is about to expire. Shop now and save!
